title: The Dawn Era - Ceratosaurus Jurassic Park Skin
description: Ceratosaurus skin from Jurassic Park and World inspired
body:
This Resource Pack change Ceratosaurus texture to 3 skins inspired from Jurassic Park and World franchise:

-male: red head ceratosaurus, inspired from Jurassic Park 3 movie

-female: blue head ceratosaurus, inspired from male skin, I did not wanted to create a boring gray skin inspired from Jurasic World: Camp Cretaceous, so I made it with blue head to add extra "spice"

-baby: just a recolour to be more appropiate with adult variants

There also 2 versions of this texture pack, one wich gives green eyes to dinos and another gives yellow eyes. Choose one of them for your preferences.

Credits:

I thank X1sh and their team for creating The Dawn Era

Also, I thank Steveguy2025 for giving me inspiration through their creation, The Dawn Era Tyrannosaurus Rex (Jurassic Park Styled)
